title: espeletia × cuniculorum
intro: Espeletia × cuniculorum, also known as Andean giant's couch or woolly espeletia, is a hybrid species of flowering plant in the daisy family Asteraceae. This plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties. The health benefits of Espeletia × cuniculorum include its ability to reduce inflammation and alleviate symptoms associated with respiratory issues, such as bronchitis and asthma. The plant can be prepared in various herbal forms, including infusions, tinctures, and inflorescences, to harness its medicinal and therapeutic properties.
